raw_consumer_statement: I ordered a service called XXXX XXXX through XXXX XXXX. Needless to say there service did not work not allowing my vehicle to be connected to there service always an error message I could not contact XXXX XXXX  directly so I disputed it through my credit card company citi bank. They said I was responsible even though I did not receive goods or services. I am disputing the amount of XXXX $ and if need be will take citi bank to court for not protrecting my consumer rights and will stop payments on credit card until issue gets resolved. There was no reason for them to side with XXXX  XXXX  and XXXX when services where not renedered.Thank you.
